title: Junior Full-stack Developer
about-message1: Hi, I'm Leevi. I first got into programming on my own, mostly self-taught through YouTube tutorials, before going to school for it. I'm now a junior Full-stack developer based in Finland who recently graduated and completed a 5-month internship, where I gained experience working on real development projects.
about-message2: I enjoy working on both back-end and front-end, but I have a stronger interest in backend development, like APIs, databases and everything that happens behind the scenes. I'm motivated to deepen my knowledge in this area and to learn new technologies along the way
about-message3: Beyond back-end development, I'm curious about fields like AI, cyber security, mobile app development and game development. Although I don't have experience in these areas yet, I'm excited and ready to learn more.
about-message4: I’m currently seeking a junior developer opportunity where I can contribute, grow as a developer and gain more real-world experience working with a professional development team.
projects-1desc: This was my first-ever project. I made it with my brother a few years ago. He handled all the front-end stuff and I did most of the back-end work with flask. The code itself wasn't great, but it worked, and it sparked my interest in programming.
projects-2desc: This app was the result of our first group-project in school. There were 5 people in our group. My job in the project was to focus on the database, to build the back-end with another group member, and finally combine front- and back-end to 1 full app.
projects-3desc: Another school project. There were 3 of us in the group. The idea of the application was to list different hobbies for users, taking into account the categories selected by the user and their location. It also included a working admin panel and a map. My role in this was the backend logic, hosting, database, project planning and combining the app together
projects-4desc: A long-term personal project, an idle game that I use as a learnig project for full-stack practice. Currently only has authentication (login/register) built with React, Express and PostgreSQL. Planned as an evolving playground where I build in new concepts as I learn them. Currently on pause while I focus on another project.
projects-5desc: This was my main project during my internship and the one that taught me the most. I handled development requests, created tickets based on them, and implemented new features, bug fixes and refactoring. The project was an internal management application used within the company.
projects-6desc: A client requested an application that could visualize Excel data as graphs. I designed a full prototype and produced documentation explaining the system and estimating the development effort for the final application.
projects-8desc: This portfolio site. Built with React and Vite, with bilingual support (English/Finnish), smooth animations using Motion, and a Swiper-based project carousel. Designed and implemented from scratch as a way to practice front-end work and present my projects in one place.
projects-7desc: My current project. The idea is an AI-assisted project management app that uses RAG for project planning, so the LLM can reason over your own project context instead of giving generic answers. Still in early stages: authentication and database are in place, dashboard in progress. RAG and AI features are planned next.
